title: Days of public rest; Juneteenth Day
doc_html:
§55.1. Days of public rest; Juneteenth Day

            The third Saturday in June, Juneteenth Day, shall be a day of public rest and a legal holiday.

            Acts 2021, No 128, §1.
doc_text:
§55.1.  Days of public rest; Juneteenth Day
The third Saturday in June, Juneteenth Day, shall be a day of public rest and a legal
holiday.
Acts 2021, No 128, §1.
